name: Frozen Lemon Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Separate the eggs, using only Grade A Uncracked Eggs.
2. In a large mixing bowl, beat egg yolks and 1/2 cup sugar until light; stir in lemon juice.
3. In a small mixing bowl, beat egg whites until soft peaks form; gradually add remaining 2 tablespoons sugar, beating until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold the egg white mixture into the lemon juice mixture.
5. Carefully fold in half of the whipped cream.
6. Fold in the remaining whipped cream.
7. Spoon the mixture into the prepared crust.
8. Freeze for at least 3 hours or until firm.
9. Serve with additional whipped cream or Blueberry 'n' Spice Sauce.
